name: AspectRatio
purpose: Reserves a predictable media frame so imagery and rich previews stay stable across device sizes.
whenToUse: Use for thumbnails, media cards, charts, or preview areas that need a consistent frame.
Use when the surrounding layout should remain stable before the child content loads.
whenNotToUse: Do not use when content height should grow naturally from text or dynamic children.
Do not wrap every card in AspectRatio unless the visual contract truly depends on a fixed media shape.
accessibilityRequirements: Treat the container as layout structure; accessible meaning should come from the child content.
Ensure images or charts inside the frame expose their own labels when they convey important meaning.
